description_long: This house features a raised main floor supported by wooden posts, with a spacious garage or storage area beneath. The upper level is accessed by an exterior wooden staircase leading to a small landing and a single main door. The roof is steeply pitched and covered in red shingles, with three prominent dormer windows providing natural light to the upper floor. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wooden siding, giving the structure a rustic yet orderly appearance. Large blue-tinted windows and a double-door garage add to the functional and inviting design.
description: A two-story wooden house with a red gable roof, three dormer windows, and an exterior staircase leading to the main entrance above a garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing three dormer windows, large blue windows, and a double-door garage beneath the raised main floor.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the exterior staircase, small landing, and main entry door, with the roof's slope visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full expanse of the red gable roof and plain wooden siding with no windows or doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the roof's slope and dormers, with plain siding and no visible entry or windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with three dormer windows on the front
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry via exterior wooden staircase to a small landing, single wooden door, no porch or columns, simple and functional.
